title: NoC usecase knowledge graph: AO52 Nonprofit Software Company
purpose: Track open information, documents, decisions, review gates and evidence for this individual usecase without storing real mandate data in Git.
privacy_rule: All value fields are intentionally empty. Real personal, property, health, estate, family or company data belongs in approved local evidence stores, not in this repository.

cases.title: AO52 Nonprofit Software Company
cases.summary: Formation/readiness package for a nonprofit-oriented software company with charitable-purpose, governance, funding and register/tax readiness questions.

required_information.label: Charitable purpose model
required_information.question: Which charitable purpose, beneficiaries and activities define the organization?

required_information.label: Entity and formation route
required_information.question: Which legal form, founders and register route are intended?

required_information.label: Funding and revenue model
required_information.question: Which grants, donations, services or commercial activities finance the organization?

required_information.label: Governance and asset-lock rules
required_information.question: Which governance restrictions, asset-lock clauses and conflict rules are required?

required_information.label: Tax precheck route
required_information.question: Which nonprofit/tax precheck route and evidence package are needed?

required_information.label: Software-company operating scope
required_information.question: Which software activities, IP ownership and service boundaries must be reflected?

gates.label: Identity, authority and data minimization reviewed

evidence.label: Reviewed Git change links KG state to approved evidence reference
